Meeting Minutes.
 * Make sure everyone is attuned *
The Raids will be post nerf and will be split between friday
and saturday, on friday we will be clearing SSC up to the 2
hour mark and then the same with TK, on saturday we will
finish SSC and TK. ( start time tbd?)
Tanks have all the resist gear ready for hydross, and Mofiah
has fire resist gear and is ready to tank Leotheras.
Trash is the hardest part of the raids, Mages will need to be
sheeping mobs, Hurp will mark mobs to CC ( Sheep, Banish
etc..)
TSM warrior video on youtube will give a good look at what
the raids will entail. (Post nerf raids)
SSC: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pbu6pyIZpdA
TK: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UftQnP65uUc
Platinum Wow also has a quick 13 minute video going over
the Raids.
SSC: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4M3Y2w8-pdw
TK: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zlw07EjaT5E&t=1s
Hurp and Dime will be working on creating the Macros
needed to pass the orbs for Lady Vashj fight. Designated
people/placements will be needed to coordinate the fight.
Healers will have to watch threat on certain boss fights as
to not pull threat.
